concerns."}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Security Model"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"chart":"\nflowchart TD\n  A[Agent] -->|Local API| M[Mnemosyne]\n  M -->|Encrypted| DB[(SQLite DB)]\n  M -->|HTTPS| E[Embeddings API]\n  DB -->|Backup| S3[Encrypted Backup]\n  \n  style M fill:#e0f2fe,stroke:#0284c7\n  style DB fill:#f0fdf4,stroke:#16a34a\n"}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Threat Model"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"| Threat | Mitigation |\n|--------|------------|\n| Data theft (local) | Encryption at rest |\n| Data theft (network) | No network exposure by default |\n| Prompt injection | Input validation, parameterized queries |\n| Memory poisoning | Importance scoring, confidence thresholds |\n| Backup exposure | Encrypted backups |"}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Security Features"}],"\n",["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Encryption at rest"}],": AES-256-GCM for database files"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"No cloud required"}],": All data stays local by default"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Input sanitization"}],": All user inputs are parameterized"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Audit logging"}],": Optional access logging"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Backup encryption"}],": GPG or AES-encrypted backups"]}],"\n"]}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Compliance"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"| Standard | Status | Notes |\n|----------|--------|-------|\n| GDPR | Compatible | Data stays local,
